name: @josiahsiegel/manifest-plugins
description: Fork-only plugins for Manifest — applied post-sync via npm run apply. The plugin host is injected into mnfst/manifest by `src/host/apply.ts` so the fork can install/request-modify Anthropic (and future) providers without re-syncing overlay patches.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && find dist -type f \( -name '*.spec.js' -o -name '*.spec.d.ts' -o -name '*.spec.js.map' -o -name '*.spec.d.ts.map' \) -delete && node scripts/filter-plugins.mjs
